crystal.title: See, then carry
crystal.sub: See your map. Carry your clarity.
crystal.body: A destiny reading helps you see your energy map; a crystal lets you carry that clarity with you.
crystal.bodyWithElement: A destiny reading helps you see your energy map; a crystal lets you carry that clarity with you. If your report suggests balancing the {element} element, this crystal is a classic remedy choice.

reportBazi.title: Read your chart, then carry the remedy
reportBazi.sub: Read your chart. Carry your remedy.
reportBazi.body: A BaZi report outlines your energy map. For further support, pair it with an elemental crystal or upgrade to a gift-box edition so insight becomes daily practice.
reportBazi.note: Unlock the full report in the app

reportZiwei.title: Read your stars, then take a step
reportZiwei.sub: Read your stars. Walk with intention.
reportZiwei.body: A Zi Wei report maps the twelve palaces of life. After reading, ask deeper questions in OraSage chat, or pair with an energy bracelet to keep balance close at hand.
reportZiwei.cta: Go to Zi Wei Dou Shu
reportZiwei.note: View the full chart reading in the app

reportTarot.title: See the moment, then choose
reportTarot.sub: See the pattern. Choose your step.
reportTarot.body: Tarot is not prediction — it is an entrance to awareness. The cards light up the present; action stays in your hands. Daily fortune and deeper reports work well together.
reportTarot.note: Draw and read inside the app

temple.title: Blessing is connection
temple.body: Every blessing connects you to a wider goodwill. Donations help keep OraSage’s blessing practice running so the experience stays available.
temple.note: Thank you for your voluntary support

ziweiChat.title: Conversation is growth
ziweiChat.body: The questions after a chart reading are often where understanding deepens. OraSage chat moves you from seeing the chart to truly knowing it.
ziweiChat.cta: Go to Zi Wei Dou Shu
ziweiChat.note: Credits top up to your account automatically

default.title: Clear the fog, take the next step
default.body: Sometimes you need not another report, but someone who listens carefully and helps you sort things out. A 30-minute consultation focuses on your most real question right now.
default.note: After payment, an advisor will confirm your time slot
